Description
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api
Main StarCosmetics API Package
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Package relating to Cosmetics API.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.pet
Package related to StarCosmetisc Pets and its API.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure
Package relating to custom StarCosmetics Structures as Cosmetics.
